items.title: An underrated gem!
items.summary:
This game has potential for it to be a well-known gacha. Despite the horrible AI translations (which the devs are slowly removing to replace it with human translations), this game has unique character designs. The story is frightening too with its nature of character death and trauma. Gameplay does reminds me of Reverse: 1999 for a bit… well, except this game has roguelike deckbuilder modes.

This game deserves more support and I truly believe that Morimens will have more players. Play this game if you’ve either played Slay the Spire or you just want to try a new genre of gachas.
items.author: aomi :3

items.title: beautiful game but lacking translation
items.summary: please get actual translators, it's such a shame that it's a beautiful game but falls flat in written dialogue. very strange phrases and wring grammar sometimes:<
items.author: Impish enjoyer
